build_this_table_view: One row per person task artifact event or session being summarized
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Stable unit ID inclusion/exclusion rules missingness timestamps or context when relevant
defensible_output: Frequency distribution pattern or descriptive profile in this dataset
reviewer_challenge: Are the records complete enough for the pattern being reported?
recommended_methods: Descriptive statistics event summaries visualization artifact inventories

build_this_table_view: One row per comparable unit with group labels and the same outcome definition
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Group membership outcome measurement timing baseline/context variables sampling notes
defensible_output: Observed group difference not intervention effect
reviewer_challenge: Are the groups meaningfully comparable and what does the label represent?
recommended_methods: Group summaries regression nonparametric comparison multilevel models when nested

example_question: How are X and Y related?
build_this_table_view: One row per unit with X Y timing and planned covariates
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Measured predictor/outcome temporal ordering if implied missingness non-overlapping measures adjustment logic
reviewer_challenge: Could timing confounding or measurement overlap explain the relation?
recommended_methods: Correlation regression multilevel association models SEM

example_question: Can early behavior predict later outcome?
build_this_table_view: Prediction table with features available before the target outcome
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Outcome timing train/test or external split leakage check feature provenance metrics chosen before inspection
reviewer_challenge: Was future or outcome information accidentally leaked into predictors?
recommended_methods: Supervised ML regularized regression calibration validation checks

build_this_table_view: Event table with one row per action turn move code or timestamped state
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Actor/session ID event label order timestamp or turn number event-definition logic
defensible_output: Pathway transition process pattern or trajectory
reviewer_challenge: Did the analysis preserve order or flatten the process into independent rows?
recommended_methods: Sequence mining TNA process mining Markov/HMM transition graphs

example_question: Why did participants act this way?
build_this_table_view: Case/evidence table linking excerpts observations artifacts and analytic memos
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Sampling logic context transcript/artifact source coding trail rival interpretations memo evidence
reviewer_challenge: What evidence supports this interpretation over alternatives?
recommended_methods: Thematic discourse interaction case or mechanism-oriented qualitative analysis

build_this_table_view: Indicator table connecting constructs to items scores traces codes or detectors
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Construct definition indicator rationale reliability validity evidence population/context fit
reviewer_challenge: Why should this indicator represent the construct here?
red_flag: Treating raw clicks as construct truth
recommended_methods: Validity argument reliability checks measurement modeling external validation

build_this_table_view: Design table linking units treatment/comparison timing outcome and identification feature
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Assignment or comparison logic baseline equivalence attrition contamination checks outcome timing
defensible_output: Effect estimate when design assumptions are met otherwise implementation-associated change
reviewer_challenge: What design feature rules out plausible alternative explanations?
red_flag: Causal language from convenience pre/post data
recommended_methods: RCT QED RD ITS SCED analysis causal models with defendable assumptions

build_this_table_view: Transport table comparing source sample/context to target population/context
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Sampling frame platform/task context subgroup coverage external validation replication or population evidence
reviewer_challenge: What population platform task and time period does this evidence represent?
recommended_methods: External validation replication subgroup analysis transportability checks

example_question: How do logs and interviews explain each other?
build_this_table_view: Joint-display table where each row connects quantitative result qualitative evidence and inference
minimum_columns_or_evidence: Mixed-methods design integration point role of each data source convergence/divergence logic
reviewer_challenge: Where exactly do the evidence sources inform or challenge each other?
red_flag: Parallel findings with no integration warrant
recommended_methods: Joint displays triangulation explanatory sequential or convergent mixed methods
